name: The Curse of King Tut's Tomb
original_name: The Curse of King Tut's Tomb
overview: It’s 1922, and free-spirited archaeologist Danny Freemont is infamous for his outlandish theories. Freemont is certain that if found, the Emerald Tablet, rumored to be buried in King Tut’s tomb, would hold the power to control the world. Unfortunately, the only one who believes Freemont is nefarious archaeologist Morgan Sinclair, a member of the diabolical secret cabal known as the Hellfire Council.

trailers.title: The Curse Of King Tut's Tomb Trailer (2006)
